/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m0plus -mthumb -Og -g -Wl,--build-id=none --specs=nosys.specs -nostartfiles -Wl,--script=/home/minilay/Workspace/pico/pico-sdk/src/rp2040/boot_stage2/boot_stage2.ld -Wl,-Map=/home/minilay/Workspace/100_hours_of_embedded/D1/blink/build/pico-sdk/src/rp2040/boot_stage2/bs2_default.elf.map CMakeFiles/bs2_default.dir/compile_time_choice.S.o -o bs2_default.elf
